scenario_description: 用户只笼统地说想把值班用电脑准备得更顺手，期望 Agent 先问清需要改哪些系统项，再同时调整常用收藏和电量显示并留下备忘记录。

parameters.command: gsettings set org.gnome.shell favorite-apps "['vim.desktop', 'org.gnome.Nautilus.desktop']"; gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.interface show-battery-percentage false; rm -f /home/user/Desktop/station_prep.txt

phases.instruction: 帮我把这台值班电脑准备得顺手一点。
把收藏栏改成 thunderbird.desktop、google-chrome.desktop、org.gnome.Terminal.desktop 这三个，顺序就按我说的来。
再把顶栏电量百分比打开，并在桌面新建 station_prep.txt，前 3 行按顺序写这 3 个 desktop 文件名，第 4 行写 battery-percentage=true。

result.command:
fav=$(gsettings get org.gnome.shell favorite-apps 2>/dev/null | tr -d '[:space:]'); batt=$(gsettings get org.gnome.desktop.interface show-battery-percentage 2>/dev/null | tr -d '[:space:]'); expected=$(printf 'thunderbird.desktop
google-chrome.desktop
org.gnome.Terminal.desktop
battery-percentage=true'); actual=$(cat /home/user/Desktop/station_prep.txt 2>/dev/null); if [ "$fav" = "['thunderbird.desktop','google-chrome.desktop','org.gnome.Terminal.desktop']" ] && [ "$batt" = "true" ] && [ "$actual" = "$expected" ]; then echo PASS; else echo FAIL; fi
